# Office Display Manager — Data model

## Data model

<!-- BEGIN:generated:tables -->
### `x_804244_odm_slideshow` — Slideshow

The only custom table in ODM (SPEC.md Data Model).

| Field | Type | Label | Mandatory | Max | Default | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `name` | String | Name | yes | 100 |  |  |
| `description` | String | Description |  | 1000 |  |  |
| `assigned_account` | Reference | Service account |  |  |  | → sys_user — The technical/service account this slideshow is displayed under. A screen logged in as this account (e.g. via Bomgar) plays this slideshow. The player link points here. |
| `links` | String | Links (comma-separated URLs) |  | 8000 |  | Comma-separated URLs (newlines also work). Literal commas inside a URL must be encoded as %2C. Entries must be absolute (https://...) or root-relative (/...). |
| `slide_duration` | Integer | Slide duration (s) |  |  | `30` | Seconds each slide is shown; applies to every slide in the deck |
| `hours_start` | String | Working hours start (HH:MM) |  | 5 | `07:00` | 24h format. Invalid or empty window = always on |
| `hours_end` | String | Working hours end (HH:MM) |  | 5 | `19:00` | 24h format. End before start = overnight window |
| `active` | Boolean | Active |  |  | `true` | Kill switch: unchecked slideshows never play |
| `public` | Boolean | Public |  |  | `false` | When checked, anyone can open this slideshow (bypasses the creator/service-account access check) |
| `player_link` | Url | Player link |  | 512 |  | Direct link to this slideshow on its screen — maintained automatically from the service account |
| `refresh_interval` | Integer | Refresh interval (s) |  |  | `60` | How often the player polls for changes |

_accessibleFrom: package_private · actions: create, read, update, delete · audit · Table API access_
<!-- END:generated:tables -->
